---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or a meaningful change to an existing one
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What's the underlying user problem? Who runs into it, when, and what do they do today as a workaround?

## Proposed solution

How would you solve it? Sketch the UI / API change, not the implementation. If a small change in an existing surface covers it, say so.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you weigh, and why did you rule it out?

## Milestone fit

Where does this fit on the roadmap?

- [ ] M1 — Open source launch
- [ ] M2 — Open beta
- [ ] M3 — Public v1
- [ ] Refactor / hygiene (no milestone gating)
- [ ] Unscheduled candidate

See [`docs/next.md`](../../docs/next.md) for the milestone tables and the *Unscheduled candidates* section. Items already in [`docs/roadmap.md`](../../docs/roadmap.md) → *Explicitly out of scope* are not going to be reopened — please check that list first.

## Anything else

Mockups, examples from other tools, prior community discussion — optional.
